telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Mar 16, 2026 Markets traded in a risk-off pattern today with the VIX elevated at 23.5 as stagflation concerns dominated sentiment. The dollar held near parity while bonds weakened, suggesting investors are positioning for persistent inflation rather than seeking traditional safe havens. Even crypto couldn't escape the defensive rotation. CLOSING PRICES BTC: $74,426 · ETH: $2,360 · SOL: $96.48 · GOLD: $5,015 · SPY: $669.03 (+0.4%) · QQQ: $600.38 (+0.5%) · VIX: $23.51 (-13.5%) · TLT: $87.21 (+0.3%) · DXY: $99.82 (-0.5%) · OIL: $94.43 (+1.0%) EVENING NEWS 🟢 Gold dips below $5,000 as inflation concerns remain main market driver 🟢 TRUMP Coin Whales Reach 5-Month High Ahead Gala Luncheon For Top Token Holders 🟢 Ethereum Has Serious Momentum, Up More than 12% Today.
